findings.summary: Module boundaries could be more explicit with clearer public API definitions
evidence: No __all__ exports to define public API surface

findings.summary: CLI function has 7 parameters which is at the upper bound of acceptable
evidence: build() function at line 403 has 7 parameters
findings.suggestion: Consider using Typer callback pattern or grouping related options

findings.summary: Dagger dependency is not clearly marked as optional for CI-only use
evidence: dagger.py imports 'import dagger' but no [project.optional-dependencies] in pyproject.toml

findings.summary: Test methods use mixed camelCase and snake_case conventions
evidence: 25 camelCase vs 169 snake_case identifiers in unit/ directories
findings.suggestion: Standardize all test method names to snake_case

findings.summary: Bare except clause at line 380 catches all exceptions without specificity
findings.suggestion: Catch specific exceptions like OSError, IOError instead of bare except

findings.summary: Test files exceed 300 lines which may reduce maintainability
findings.suggestion: Split test files by feature area for better maintainability

findings.summary: __init__.py contains only a comment without meaningful module documentation
evidence: File content: '# Build system tests' - single comment line
findings.suggestion: Add proper module docstring or remove if empty file is acceptable

findings.summary: Mix of async and sync I/O operations reduces composability
evidence: build_image() is async but _get_total_memory_gb() is sync despite doing I/O
findings.suggestion: Make all I/O-bound operations consistently async

findings.summary: BuildConfig has 3 optional fields with defaults which increases cognitive load
evidence: BuildConfig dataclass: ai_optimization=True, reproducible=True, compress=True defaults
findings.suggestion: Consider using builder pattern for complex configurations

findings.summary: Division operations with MB/GB constants are inline rather than using helper functions
evidence: Lines 368, 379: 'value // MB' and 'stat.free // GB' inline divisions
findings.suggestion: Create helper functions like to_mb(bytes) and to_gb(bytes) for clarity

findings.summary: build_image method has moderate cyclomatic complexity
evidence: build_image() calls 8 async methods with branching logic
findings.suggestion: Extract build phases into separate orchestration methods

findings.summary: Package uses flat layout instead of recommended src/ layout
evidence: regicide_image_builder.py is in build-system/ root, not build-system/src/
findings.suggestion: Consider migrating to src/ layout for better test isolation
